data.description:
## Incident Overview

**Scenario Type**: Agent friction / hook defect
**Source**: /dso:end-session technical-learnings sweep, 2026-04-27 worktree session

### Expected Behavior

After running record-test-status.sh and obtaining `Test status recorded: passed (diff_hash=X)`, the next `git commit` invocation should observe the same diff hash X when its pre-commit hooks compute it.

### Actual Behavior

Pre-commit's auto-stash mechanism (`[INFO] Stashing unstaged files to .../patch...`) transforms the working tree before commit-time hash computation. The resulting hash differs from the one recorded by record-test-status. The test gate hook then reports:

```
BLOCKED: test gate — code changed since tests were recorded.
  Recorded hash: <X>...
  Current hash:  <Y>...
```

The agent must re-run record-test-status, which records hash Y, but the next commit attempt may produce yet another hash if any stash-pop side effects shift the tree again. Multi-iteration loops occur when an unstaged file is touched between record and commit.

### Reproduction (observed in this session, 3 separate times)

1. Stage a subset of changes (`git add <some-files>`).
2. Run `DSO_COMMIT_WORKFLOW=1 bash plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh` — records hash X.
3. Run `git commit`. Pre-commit auto-stashes the unstaged remainder, runs hooks against the new working-tree state, observes hash Y ≠ X, blocks.
4. Re-run record-test-status (now records hash Y), retry commit, repeat if hash drifts again.

### Workaround Discovered

Park the unstaged work explicitly before recording:
```
git stash push --keep-index -m "unstaged work during commit"
DSO_COMMIT_WORKFLOW=1 bash plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh
git commit ...
git stash pop
```

### Investigation Plan

1. Reproduce in isolation: stage one file, modify another file unstaged, run record-test-status, run commit, capture both hashes.
2. Trace compute-diff-hash.sh and pre-commit hook order — identify whether record-test-status hashes the staged-vs-HEAD diff or the working-tree-vs-HEAD diff.
3. Either: (a) make record-test-status hash staged-only content (matching what pre-commit's auto-stash will leave behind), or (b) document the workaround in CLAUDE.md / commit-workflow guide.

### Severity Justification

Priority 2: caused real debugging time across 3 iterations in one session; will recur every time an agent commits a partial subset of changes.
data.title: [pre-commit-test-gate]: auto-stash of unstaged files transforms working tree -> diff hash mismatch on retry, forces repeated record-test-status invocations
